emails.subject: Re: ENA-Cal
emails.body: Re: ENA-Cal These ARE a kind of desk-to-desk deal, but officially they are cross-portfolio deals, because they cross from the ENAEXEC to WEST portfolio. I'm not familiar with Unity, but let me check around here and see if anyone knows where these deals should be settled. Also let me know if the fact that they are cross-portfolio deals helps you at all. That's all I know right now. Kate Rhonda L Denton 02/12/2001 01:22 PM

emails.subject: ENA-Cal
emails.body: ENA-Cal Do the deals booked here need to go to Unify to be settled? Are they desk to desk? Sorry to bug you but I'm assigning contract numbers.

emails.subject: Re: ENA-Cal
emails.body: If its just an internal move, then it doesn't get paid as far as I understand. Its an internal thing. Thanks for the info. Unify is the system that creates our invoices. Kate Symes 02/12/2001 03:20 PM
